indications.text:
Carefully consider the potential benefits and risks of RELAFEN and other treatment options
before deciding to use RELAFEN. Use the lowest effective dose for the shortest duration consistent
with individual patient treatment goals (see WARNINGS).
RELAFEN is indicated for relief of signs and symptoms ...

RELAFEN is indicated for acute and chronic treatment of signs and symptoms of osteoarthritis
and rheumatoid arthritis.
